items.claim: Dioni Barbosa has high-level judo skills.
Anna Melisano has significant deficiencies in her grappling defense.
items.quote: she has giant holes in the grappling.

items.claim: Anna Melisano is unable to defend takedowns or submissions.
items.quote: she can't defend takedowns or submissions.

items.claim: Damen Anderson lacks technical striking proficiency.
items.quote: he's not very technical. He's just kind of throwing and then throwing hard.

items.claim: Ezra Elliot possesses superior pacing compared to Damen Anderson.
items.quote: I think Ezra Elliott is a guy who has better pacing.

items.claim: Ezra Elliot has better wrestling than Damen Anderson.
Alvin Hines has not competed in the last 12 months due to a steroid suspension.
items.quote: he hasn't fought in a year. And that's because he was suspended for steroids.

items.claim: Alvin Hines demonstrates high durability and the ability to absorb significant damage.
items.quote: He is incredibly tough. He can take a full beating as we saw in this fight while continuing to move forward.

items.claim: R.J. Harris lacks clean striking technique.
items.quote: No one's ever gonna watch an R.J. Harris fight and say, 'Wow, what spectacular clean technique.'

items.claim: Alden Cora is a highly skilled wrestler with effective takedown entries.
items.quote: He's a very good wrestler. He's got a nice little snatch single where he grabs a leg, runs the pipe immediately

items.claim: Alden Cora is defensively vulnerable on the feet.
items.quote: I do wish he was a little busier and was a little more defensively sound because he can be a bit hitable

items.claim: Steuart Nickel relies on strength and ground-and-pound rather than striking power to finish fights.
items.quote: You're going to see some knockouts on his record, but I promise you he is not knocking people out on their feet. That's mostly ground and pound.

items.claim: Felipe Franco is physically durable and tough.
items.quote: he's pretty tough. He's pretty durable

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. possesses solid takedown defense.
